videos.headline: BYU's Kingston weaves through traffic on electric punt-return TD
videos.description: Parker Kingston evades multiple Colorado defenders and goes the distance on a punt return touchdown to put BYU up 17-0 in the second quarter.

videos.headline: BYU strikes first on LJ Martin's powerful TD run
videos.description: BYU's LJ Martin bounces off a defender and into the end zone on a strong touchdown run against Colorado.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (BYU strikes first on LJ Martin's powerful TD run) 2024/12/28

videos.headline: BYU stuns Colorado with onside kick and recovery in 1st quarter
